---
name: New Team Template
about: Propose a new team template for the library
title: "[Template] "
labels: library
---

## Domain

What domain or field does this template serve? (e.g., web development, data science, technical writing)

## Goal

What does this template help a team accomplish? Describe the end-to-end workflow it supports.

## Proposed Roles

List the agent roles this template would include:

- **Role 1**: Brief description of responsibilities
- **Role 2**: Brief description of responsibilities
- **Role 3**: Brief description of responsibilities

## Artifact Chain

Describe what flows between roles. What does each role produce and what does the next role consume?

1. Role 1 produces -> artifact A
2. Role 2 consumes artifact A, produces -> artifact B
3. Role 3 consumes artifact B, produces -> final deliverable

## Why This Template

What makes this pattern common enough to templatize? Include examples of real projects or teams that follow this structure. Explain why ad-hoc agent creation is insufficient.
